headline: Shares of energy stocks are trading lower. Russia-Ukraine ceasefire hopes have pressured oil prices, and reports of warmer weather forecasts weigh on natural gas.
summary: Shares of energy stocks are trading lower. Russia-Ukraine ceasefire hopes have pressured oil prices, and reports of warmer weather forecasts weigh on natural gas.
